name: dubisnake
description: Nokia-style Snake game with a profile-photo head, popcorn food, and Pac-Man-style monster chasers. Ships as one self-contained index.html built from split sources under src/.

scripts.verify: node build.mjs && git diff --exit-code -- index.html || (echo 'index.html is stale - run: node build.mjs, then commit' && exit 1)
